---
title: "BasalCellDemo Vignette"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{ BasalCellDemo Vignette}
  %\VignetteEngine{rmarkdown::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```
# This is a Mock Vignette
- Manuscripts written within `basalcelldemo_rtools` are converted to HTML
using `pkgdown` and published at [https://basalcelldemo.readthedocs.io/en/latest/r_api/](https://basalcelldemo.readthedocs.io/en/latest/r_api/).
- Because these files are somewhat isolated from the documentation built by Sphinx,
we do not actively recommend creating vignettes other than standard `.R` script documentation (e.g., using `roxygen2`).
(You can achieve the same functionality using `.ipynb` files, which can be integrated and built seamlessly with Sphinx).
- However, as demonstrated in this file, you can still add a vignette by creating an `.Rmd` file including YAML header tags.
- Like any other `.Rmd` file, you can write your content using
standard Markdown (`.md`) syntax while embedding R code inside code blocks.
Please use this feature for purposes such as creating tutorials for your R scripts.

# Example
## Polynomial Ring
```{r}
sca_ <- function(a, f) {
  function(x) a * f(x)
}

add_ <- function(fp, fq) {
  function(x) fp(x) + fq(x)
}

mul_ <- function(fp, fq) {
  function(x) fp(x) * fq(x)
}

f1 <- function(x) {
  x
}

f2 <- function(x) {
  x^2
}

f3 <- function(x) {
  x^3
}

v <- 1234
w <- 5678
```

### Scalar Multiplication
#### Closure
```{r}
typeof(sca_(w, f2)(v))
typeof(sca_(v, f2)(w))
```

### Summation
#### Closure
```{r}
typeof(add_(f1, f2)(v))
typeof(add_(f1, f2)(w))
```

#### Commutativity
```{r}
add_(f1, f2)(v) == add_(f2, f1)(v)
add_(f1, f2)(w) == add_(f2, f1)(w)
```

#### Associativity
```{r}
add_(add_(f1, f2), f3)(v) == add_(f1, add_(f2, f3))(v)
add_(add_(f1, f2), f3)(w) == add_(f1, add_(f2, f3))(w)
```

#### Identity Element
```{r}
fis <- function(x) {
  0
}
add_(f1, fis)(v) == f1(v)
add_(f1, fis)(w) == f1(w)
add_(f2, fis)(v) == f2(v)
add_(f2, fis)(w) == f2(w)
```

#### Inverse Element
```{r}
get_inverse <- function(f) {
  sca_(-1, f)
}
add_(f1, get_inverse(f1))(v) == fis(v)
add_(f1, get_inverse(f1))(w) == fis(w)
add_(f2, get_inverse(f2))(v) == fis(v)
add_(f2, get_inverse(f2))(w) == fis(w)
```

### Multiplication
#### Closure
```{r}
typeof(mul_(f1, f2)(v))
typeof(mul_(f1, f2)(w))
```

#### Commutativity
```{r}
mul_(f1, f2)(v) == mul_(f2, f1)(v)
mul_(f1, f2)(w) == mul_(f2, f1)(w)
```

#### Associativity
```{r}
mul_(mul_(f1, f2), f3)(v) == mul_(f1, mul_(f2, f3))(v)
mul_(mul_(f1, f2), f3)(w) == mul_(f1, mul_(f2, f3))(w)
```

#### Identity Element
```{r}
fim <- function(x) {
  1
}
mul_(f1, fim)(v) == f1(v)
mul_(f1, fim)(w) == f1(w)
mul_(f2, fim)(v) == f2(v)
mul_(f2, fim)(w) == f2(w)
```

---
This project was created with [Cookiecutter](https://github.com/cookiecutter/cookiecutter) and [BasalCell](https://github.com/yo-aka-gene/BasalCell) version 0.4.1
